manifest.name: Todoist Indicator

manifest.author: Instant AI
manifest.name: Rapid AI
manifest.description: AI Assistant for selected text and generating content with Markdown. Shortcuts and quick action buttons provide instant AI assistance. It provides a high availability API for unlimited Chat GPT request rates, so you can ensure smooth work for any workload.

manifest.author: William Liang
manifest.name: Papers

manifest.name: No Empty Windows
manifest.description: Closes Obsidian window with cmd+W on Mac when the last tab is closed.

manifest.author: Marcos Talau
manifest.name: Previous Daily Note
manifest.description: Open the previous daily note. Unlike the "Daily notes" command "Open previous daily note", it opens the previous daily note starting from today, rather than the daily note currently open.

manifest.author: Cassandra McCarthy
manifest.name: Hyphenation
manifest.description: Enables justified text and hyphenation

manifest.name: Automatic Table Of Contents
